text.title: Buyer Interview Script for Freelancers Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Interview produces generic advice ('be visible on LinkedIn'); no actionable signal.
antipattern.root-cause: Script never asked about last hiring trigger.
antipattern.fix: Elicit event + date + decision-maker within first 15 minutes.

antipattern.symptom: Freelancer pitches the wrong person; budget owner is two levels up.
antipattern.root-cause: Interview never surfaced who actually holds budget.
antipattern.fix: Ask 'who signs off on freelance budget' explicitly; log declines as unverified.

antipattern.symptom: Insight: 'buyers prefer referrals'; built on 1 anecdote per buyer.
antipattern.root-cause: Vendor-preference asked for last hire only.
antipattern.fix: Ask about last 3 freelance hires; flag single-hire claims.

antipattern.symptom: Buyer's responses become non-committal compliments; data useless for synthesis.
antipattern.fix: No-pitch rule; pitch contamination excludes the transcript.
